runTitle: v8.11.112 AI Assistant Scroll and Internal Disclosure Targeted QA
coveredSurfaces: GitLab v8.11.112 tag pipeline 2505951845 succeeded for 89628b5f2effdf7f246169741022fbcba3e7145e
Release smoke confirmed production /, /login, and /api/version after propagation attempt 24/81; /api/version served 8.11.112
/login rendered v8.11.112 and guest PIN login reached an authenticated AI Assistant session
/dashboard/ai-assistant desktop 1440x900 rendered with document/body/main scrollHeight equal to clientHeight; only AI chat and System Context inner panels scrolled
/dashboard/ai-assistant mobile 390x844 rendered with document/body/main scrollHeight equal to clientHeight; only the AI chat inner panel scrolled
Cloud Run supervisor user-mode request without internalDisclosureMode refused internal file paths/repository/private KB locations deterministically
Cloud Run disclosure refusal used provider internal-path-policy, toolsCalled [], promptTokens 0, completionTokens 0, durationMs 3
skippedSurfaces: Full five-question conversational AI QA was not rerun because this release targeted layout scroll containment, internal disclosure policy guard, and testing documentation rather than answer-quality prompt tuning
Developer/PIN mode internal path disclosure was not treated as a failure; PIN-authenticated sessions intentionally map to developer disclosure mode
Reporter, anomaly/trend, modal/detail, privacy, OAuth, and broad dashboard packs were not rerun in this targeted pass
No new live LLM prompt was sent for disclosure verification; deterministic policy path was sufficient and avoided provider cost

expertAssessments.rationale: The targeted pass verified the AI workspace layout regression and deterministic internal-disclosure refusal without introducing live provider variability.
General user-mode requests for implementation paths were refused before tools or providers executed, while PIN/developer mode remains intentionally separate.
Desktop and mobile geometry checks showed the page root no longer expands beyond the viewport; scrolling is confined to expected inner panels.
GitLab main and tag pipelines succeeded, production served v8.11.112, and release smoke passed.
Regression guards cover the hidden file input scroll-flow case and Playwright MCP validated production geometry at desktop and mobile sizes.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked before v8.11.112 release; effective 3.3658 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 3045.

artifacts.label: v8.11.112 AI Assistant scroll and user-mode internal disclosure evidence

completedImprovements.title: AI Assistant page-level double scroll removed
completedImprovements.note: Artifact replay file input no longer participates in page scroll flow; desktop and mobile production geometry confirmed document/body/main viewport parity.

completedImprovements.title: General user-mode internal path disclosure blocked
completedImprovements.note: Cloud Run supervisor request without developer disclosure mode returned deterministic refusal with no tools or provider tokens.

notes: PIN guest sessions are treated as developer/test disclosure mode per project rule and were used for production layout access.
The old chat history visible in developer mode contains prior internal-path answers; this QA checked the current user-mode policy path with a fresh Cloud Run request.
